title: ligusticum bulbocastanum
intro: Ligusticum bulbocastanum, also known as Chinese angelica or Yuan hua, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Ligusticum bulbocastanum include relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ligusticum bulbocastanum include teas, infusions, and dried roots, which are commonly used to promote digestion and alleviate colds and flu symptoms.
